CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2017 Set For Trial On Oct-16-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF TRIMARK ERF, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is taken off calendar per the request of the moving party. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189; Dept. 302.

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Mar-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan L. Dahm, of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC, Tel. 415.989.4730, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TRIMARK ERF, INC.'s APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER against defendant Staffan Terje is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
